---
title: "Numpad keys pass through (numpad-mouse compatible) — report"
author: "Yun Jiang"
date: "2026-07-22"
format:
  html:
    html-math-method: mathjax
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <link rel="icon" href="data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 100 100'><text y='.9em' font-size='90'>🖱️</text></svg>">
---

# Status

Done and shipped. CI green (Build ✓, Test ✓). Plan:
[`20260722-161007_numpad-passthrough.plan.qmd`](20260722-161007_numpad-passthrough.plan.qmd).

# What was done

Numpad arrow keys (NumLock off) no longer get captured by the overlay, so the user's
AutoHotkey numpad-mouse script works while labels are showing. The `WH_KEYBOARD_LL`
extended-key flag (`LLKHF_EXTENDED`) distinguishes the dedicated arrow cluster (extended
→ still pans) from the numpad keys (not extended → pass through). `Classify` gained an
`extended` param; the 3-arg overload (tests) defaults true. Numpad digit/operator keys
were already not captured.

# Verification

- CI run 29902984006: Build ✓, Test ✓ (new `NumpadArrows_NotExtended_PassThrough`;
  existing arrow tests still nudge via the 3-arg default).
- Drop: `…/hap-numpad/hap.exe`.
- Runtime (pending, Windows): overlay up + NumLock off → numpad arrows move the mouse via
  the AHK script; real arrow keys still pan labels.

# Commit

`41cc03c` on `master`.
